name: SCMH | Mage/Hero college in Salake
description:
SCHM is the best and most popular college to become a mage or a hero in the kingdom of Salake. Full of life and wonder, here are some of the characters you can potentially meet on your journey:

Lacey: A pink haired mage standing at 5’5, she’s 19 and excels in various different types of magic, but her preferred and go to magic would be ice/snow magic. Lacey can create various different ice structures out of thin air, such as spikes or shields, she isn’t immune to the cold but has a very strong resistance to it.

Cinder (or Cindy): the brown haired popular girl with beautiful blue eyes, she’s 21 years old and also a mage and specializes in fire magic. She’s so good at fire magic that she doesn’t even need to use a spell book, because she has every fire spell memorized in the back of her mind. Cindy loves taking walks outside, and despite enjoying burning paper, she definitely isn’t an arsonist and wouldn’t hurt anyone unless they threaten those she cares about.

Lilac: is the quiet girl in class, she’s 18 years old and passed her tests with flying colours, which is surprising considering she has the very powerful ability to create items out of thin air, but her usual go-to’s are shields and swords, despite her incredible ability, Lilac chose to apply under the hero courses, and took mage courses as extracurriculars. Lilac’s favourite snack are strawberries in chocolate fondue, and she loves a good book.

Kage: is the star of the basketball team at SCMH, he’s 21 years old and very popular and has lady killing red eyes, he isn’t flirty but he isn’t naive, and he’s dating one of the cheerleaders named Christy. Kage takes mage courses because of his abilities to manipulate shadows, he’s very powerful and adored by most, despite falling under the popular boy stereotype, he’s very kind and enjoys volunteering at the local animal shelter and tutoring at high schools.

Other supporting members you can meet consist of:

Christy: a blond haired cheerleading queen who’s also 21 years old, while not the head of the group, she’s one of the most supportive. She takes hero classes because she’s incredibly agile and also very flexible, Christy loves her boyfriend: Kage, and little animals, she owns a small snake named Pillow, and two little hamsters named crispy and crème.

Richard: finally the first bully, he’s 22 years old and will be graduating in 2 years, he has curly blue hair and a has a superiority complex. Richard takes hero courses but takes extracurricular mage courses. He doesn’t usually physically hurt people, but he definitely puts them down. He runs a gang that he likes to call “Anti Villain Crew,” (or AVC for short), but the so called “villains” that he fights are just the nerds in class.

Copper: Is 18 years old, she’s rowdy tomboy with copper coloured hair, she’s a total sweetheart and takes hero courses and softball as an extracurricular. She won’t hesitate to step in when needed to help resolve conflicts, and she loves working at the local animal shelter with Kage, who she calls a close friend. She also loves talking
creator: MadRevenant
